$comment: This is an IIOS deployment manifest, not Hermes' native config format (same distinction as deploy/hermes/profiles/ict-trading.profile.json — see docs/31_HERMES_DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE.md section 15). Git is the authoritative source. No native Hermes config.yaml is generated by this task (docs/32_ONYX_EXECUTIVE_ORCHESTRATOR_SPEC.md section 7 — materialization is future work, not implemented here). Path convention corrected in the topology reconciliation (docs/ADR/ADR-0013-HERMES-VPS-DEPLOYMENT-MODEL.md Amendment 2): onyx is a named profile inside the single shared Hermes container (deploy/hermes/core/docker-compose.yml.template), materialized via `docker exec hermes hermes profile create onyx`, not a dedicated container with its own /srv/iios/ root as an earlier draft specified.
brain_registry_ref: BRAIN-COO (docs/BRAIN_REGISTRY.md) — ONYX is the persistent-agent operationalization of the already-specified COO Brain entry, not a second/duplicate Brain
agent_registry_ref: AGENT-ONYX (docs/AGENT_REGISTRY.md) — distinct from and narrower-scoped than AGENT-ORCHESTRATOR, which remains subordinate directly to Governance for approved-objective decomposition
runtime_topology: Named profile inside the single shared Hermes container (docs/ADR/ADR-0013-HERMES-VPS-DEPLOYMENT-MODEL.md decision 2, 10). Isolation from co-located profiles is application-layer only (separate HERMES_HOME subtree, separate s6 gateway slot) — not OS/container-layer. See that ADR's 'Real isolation boundaries' table before assuming stronger separation than exists.

terminal.cwd_note: Best-effort value, not independently confirmed against a real `hermes profile create onyx` + `hermes config show -p onyx` — whether a NAMED (non-default) profile's HERMES_HOME resolves to /opt/data/profiles/onyx/ for terminal.home_mode=profile purposes, versus the container-wide /opt/data, was not verified during this design task. Confirm before activation and correct this value if wrong.
